title: Flows
subtitle: Build branching, button-driven WhatsApp conversations. Useful for menus, FAQs, and triage before a human steps in.
deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? Any active runs will end immediately.
createDialogDesc: Start from a template or build from scratch.
emptyDesc: Build your first conversation — a welcome menu, an order lookup, an FAQ bot. Customers tap buttons; the bot routes them to the right answer (or the right agent).
triggerFirstInbound: Triggers on a contact's first-ever inbound message
runsSubtitle: The 50 most recent times this flow ran. Expand a row to see the engine's per-step log.
runsEmpty: No runs yet. Trigger the flow from a personal WhatsApp number to see it appear here.
noEventsRecorded: No events recorded for this run.
